SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made on this 5th day of October, 2023, by and between:

Seller: Dr Tan Wei Ming, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, email: tanweiming@fictionmail.sg, phone: +65 9123 4567.

Purchaser: Ms Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC No. S8765432H, residing at 456 Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 259999, email: sitiaishah@syntheticmail.sg, phone: +65 9234 5678.

Company: Example Pte. Ltd., UEN: T12LL3456X, a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 789 Raffles Place, Singapore 048888.

Consideration: The Purchaser agrees to purchase from the Seller 100% of the issued shares in Example Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000 (Five Hundred Thousand Singapore Dollars).

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
